course.title: Lesson 20: One Man in a Boat

segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why is fishing the writer's favorite sport?

translations.zh-Hans: 为什么钓鱼是作者最喜欢的运动？
钓鱼是我最喜欢的运动。

segments.text: I often fish for hours without catching anything.

translations.zh-Hans: 我常一钓就是几个小时，却什么也钓不到。

segments.text: But this does not worry me.
Instead of catching fish, they catch old boots and rubbish.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们钓不到鱼，反而钓上旧靴子和垃圾。

segments.text: I never catch anything, not even old boots.

translations.zh-Hans: 我什么也钓不到，连旧靴子也没有。

segments.text: After having spent whole mornings on the river, I always go home with an empty bag.

translations.zh-Hans: 在河边耗费整个上午后，我总是提着空袋子回家。

segments.text: You must give up fishing, my friends say.
But they don't realize one important thing.

translations.zh-Hans: 但他们没有认识到一件重要的事。

segments.text: I'm not really interested in fishing.

translations.zh-Hans: 我对钓鱼其实并不感兴趣。

segments.text: I am only interested in sitting in a boat and doing nothing at all.

translations.zh-Hans: 我只对坐在船上无所事事感兴趣。
